requirement_topic.en: HFC Refrigerant Controls — Import and Sale
requirement_topic.zh: HFC制冷剂管制——进口和销售
requirement_topic.zht: HFC制冷劑管制——進口和銷售

summary.en: Canada's Ozone-depleting Substances and Halocarbon Alternatives Regulations under the Canadian Environmental Protection Act, 1999 control HFCs and certain products containing or designed to contain HFCs. Importers must check whether the heat pump, pre-charged refrigerant, bulk refrigerant, servicing refrigerant, and any GWP-based restriction, permit, allowance, or reporting rule applies before import or sale.
summary.zh: 加拿大依据《1999年加拿大环境保护法》制定的《消耗臭氧层物质和卤代烃替代物法规》管制HFC以及某些含有或设计用于含有HFC的产品。进口商在进口或销售前必须核查热泵、预充注制冷剂、散装制冷剂、维修用制冷剂以及任何基于GWP的限制、许可证、配额或申报规则是否适用。
summary.zht: 加拿大依據《1999年加拿大環境保護法》制定的《消耗臭氧層物質和鹵代烴替代物法規》管制HFC以及某些含有或設計用於含有HFC的產品。進口商在進口或銷售前必須核查熱泵、預充注制冷劑、散裝制冷劑、維修用制冷劑以及任何基於GWP的限制、許可證、配額或申報規則是否適用。

standards_or_laws: Ozone-depleting Substances and Halocarbon Alternatives Regulations (SOR/2016-137)

summary.en: Chinese product files typically identify refrigerant type and charge quantity under GB/T 7725, GB/T 9237, GB/T 25127, or export bill-of-material controls. China documentation may not include Canadian HFC allowance, permit, product prohibition, or importer reporting analysis.
summary.zh: 中国产品文件通常依据GB/T 7725、GB/T 9237、GB/T 25127或出口物料清单控制来标明制冷剂类型和充注量。中国文件可能不包括加拿大HFC配额、许可证、产品禁止或进口商申报分析。
summary.zht: 中國產品文件通常依據GB/T 7725、GB/T 9237、GB/T 25127或出口物料清單控制來標明制冷劑類型和充注量。中國文件可能不包括加拿大HFC配額、許可證、產品禁止或進口商申報分析。

gap.en: R410A, R32, R454B, R290, and other refrigerant options must be checked against Canadian HFC and halocarbon rules, including whether the import is equipment, a charged product, or a controlled substance. Chinese refrigerant labels and SDS files do not establish Canadian allowance or product-rule compliance.
gap.zh: R410A、R32、R454B、R290及其他制冷剂方案必须按加拿大HFC和卤代烃规则核查，包括进口对象是设备、已充注产品还是受控物质。中国制冷剂标签和SDS文件不能证明加拿大配额或产品规则合规。
gap.zht: R410A、R32、R454B、R290及其他制冷劑方案必須按加拿大HFC和鹵代烴規則核查，包括進口對象是設備、已充注產品還是受控物質。中國制冷劑標籤和SDS文件不能證明加拿大配額或產品規則合規。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (federal HFC and halocarbon controls apply where the substance or product is within scope)
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent; Chinese refrigerant identification and safety standards do not create Canadian HFC allowances or permits

source.publisher: Justice Laws Website / Government of Canada

compliance_verdict.en: Major gap for HFC-charged units — importer must confirm Canadian HFC product restrictions, allowances, permits, and reporting before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: HFC充注机组存在重大差距——进口商必须在出货前确认加拿大HFC产品限制、配额、许可证和申报要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: HFC充注機組存在重大差距——進口商必須在出貨前確認加拿大HFC產品限制、配額、許可證和申報要求。
